Heads up — the walker posts a marker shaped like `<!-- cost-pattern-data ... -->`
mid-sentence like this one, and no presence-gate should ever treat that inline
mention as the real marker.

<!-- cost-pattern-data
version: 1
coverage: claude-only-with-copilot-fallback-warning
install_status: ok
session_completeness: complete
generated_at: 2026-07-18T06:16:17Z
pr: 879
totals:
  cost_estimate_usd: 12.3456
anomaly_flags: []
-->

Trailer text after the block, untouched by any splice.
